records.question: Which employees named Arnelle are teaching classes in section 1?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT employee.emp_num FROM employee
JOIN class ON employee.emp_num = class.prof_num
WHERE class.class_section = '1' AND employee.emp_fname = 'Arnelle'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT e.EMP_NUM
FROM EMPLOYEE e
JOIN CLASS c ON e.EMP_NUM = c.PROF_NUM
WHERE (e.EMP_FNAME = 'Arnelle' OR e.EMP_LNAME = 'Arnelle')
AND c.CLASS_SECTION = '1'

AND EMP_DOB = '1961-11-02'

records.question: Which employees teach courses with exactly 3.0 credits in the Computer Info. Systems department?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT employee.emp_num FROM employee
JOIN class ON employee.emp_num = class.prof_num
JOIN course ON class.crs_code = course.crs_code
JOIN department ON course.dept_code = department.dept_code
WHERE course.crs_credit = 3.0 AND department.dept_name = 'Computer Info. Systems'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT e.EMP_NUM
FROM EMPLOYEE e
JOIN CLASS c ON e.EMP_NUM = c.PROF_NUM
JOIN COURSE cr ON c.CRS_CODE = cr.CRS_CODE
JOIN DEPARTMENT d ON cr.DEPT_CODE = d.DEPT_CODE
WHERE cr.CRS_CREDIT = 3.0
AND d.DEPT_NAME = 'Computer Info. Systems'

WHERE e.EMP_LNAME = 'Graztevski'

AND DATE(e.EMP_HIREDATE) = '1978-08-01'
